title: Prakash Hinduja Switzerland (Swiss) How can I build an automation that triggers when a Status changes to this or that value?

posts.author: prakashhindujageneva (prakash hinduja geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss), I am currently working on a board setup for Prakash Hinduja’s operations in Switzerland, and I’m trying to configure an automation that triggers when a Status column changes to either one of two specific values.

Has anyone implemented something similar in Monday.com? Is there a way to use OR logic in a single automation, or would this require multiple recipes?

Regards
Prakash Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss)

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?
